synopsis:
In Jabba the Hutt's palace on Tatooine, interrogation droids move to wipe the memory of a translator known as "the Talky droid" for a minor mistake. The droid protests and turns the tables, seizing control of the palace's other droids and even Jabba's guards, turning them against their master.

Meanwhile, Lando Calrissian, delighted to find his old outfits still aboard the *Millennium Falcon*, disguises himself as a bounty hunter and talks his way into the palace on the pretext that the cyborg Lobot needs urgent medical care. Inside, he learns that all the droids have "gone bad," and he passes Boba Fett gunning them down and the carbonite-frozen Han Solo on the wall before a trapdoor drops him and Lobot into a rancor's cell.

There they find the Talky droid hiding. It reveals that the palace's droids are being assimilated by a unifying foreign intelligence and demands Lando smuggle it out in one piece before it will repair Lobot. As they argue, the rancor wakes, leaving Lando and Lobot trapped between the enraged beast and the corrupted droids.
title: Star Wars (2020) #38
